body.purpose: Translation output, explanatory text, and compact prose.

label.purpose: Buttons, controls, metadata, and status labels.

shadows.name: panel-shadow
shadows.purpose: Separates the selection panel from arbitrary page content.

shadows.name: trigger-shadow
shadows.purpose: Resting elevation for the floating selection trigger.

motion.name: state-ease-out
motion.purpose: Default hover, focus, and active transitions.

breakpoints.name: panel-viewport-guard
breakpoints.purpose: Keeps floating panel usable near viewport edges.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Compact primary action for extension surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { height: 28px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; padding: 0 8px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; background: oklch(0.588 0.158 241.966); color: oklch(0.985 0.01 237.3); font: 500 12px/1.625 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.53 0.158 242); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.65 0.15 239); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Icon Button
components.description: Quiet toolbar action for panel headers.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost" aria-label="Close"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6.4 6.4 17.6 17.6M17.6 6.4 6.4 17.6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { width: 28px; height: 28px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.49 0.035 240); transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.951 0.018 237); color: oklch(0.2 0.015 240); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.65 0.15 239); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.48; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Floating Trigger
components.description: Temporary circular action that appears near selected text.
components.html: <button class="ds-floating-trigger" aria-label="Open Salto"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5v14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-floating-trigger { width: 32px; height: 32px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(0.588 0.158 241.966); color: oklch(0.985 0.01 237.3); box-shadow: 0 3px 8px oklch(0.2 0.03 240 / 0.24); transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-floating-trigger svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; } .ds-floating-trigger:hover { background: oklch(0.53 0.158 242); box-shadow: 0 4px 8px oklch(0.2 0.03 240 / 0.28); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-floating-trigger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.65 0.15 239); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Selection Panel
components.description: Floating dialog shell for reading-time translation.
components.css: .ds-selection-panel { width: min(360px, calc(100vw - 16px)); height: min(220px, calc(100vh - 16px)); display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid oklch(0.86 0.025 238); border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.2 0.015 240); box-shadow: 0 4px 8px oklch(0.2 0.03 240 / 0.2); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-selection-panel__header { position: relative; min-height: 44px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end; padding: 6px 8px 6px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.86 0.025 238); background: oklch(0.976 0.007 240); } .ds-selection-panel__grip { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; width: 34px; height: 4px; border-radius: 2px; background: oklch(0.86 0.025 238); transform: translate(-50%, -50%); } .ds-selection-panel__content { min-height: 0; flex: 1; background: oklch(1 0 0); }

narrative.overview: Salto's extension UI should feel like a precise note that appears beside the text, not a separate application arriving on top of the page. The visual system is compact, restrained, and native to a productivity tool: white panels, cool-blue action color, crisp borders, small controls, and short state transitions.
keyCharacteristics: Compact density with stable dimensions for floating controls.
Restrained color: blue means primary action, focus, or selected state.
System sans typography only; no display type in task UI.
Clear focus, disabled, hover, and active states on every control.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Reading Blue is the only brand accent on extension UI; do not add decorative hues to translation panels or saved-word controls.

rules.name: The Above Any Page Rule
rules.body: Foreground panels must maintain strong contrast against arbitrary web pages; if a page background fights the panel, strengthen the panel border or shadow before adding decoration.

rules.name: The No Display Type Rule
rules.body: Product UI labels, buttons, and floating panels always use the system sans stack; display fonts are forbidden in extension surfaces.

rules.name: The Purposeful Lift Rule
rules.body: Shadows exist to separate extension UI from page content. Do not use wide soft shadows as decoration.

dos: Do preserve the reading flow; every panel should help the user understand or save selected text without pulling attention away for longer than necessary.
Do use Reading Blue for primary action, focus, selected, or active states only.
Do keep extension panels compact, with stable viewport-aware dimensions and restrained 8px panel radii.
Do make saved, loading, failed, enriched, ready, and retry states visible and unambiguous.
Do provide hover, focus-visible, active, disabled, loading, and error treatments for interactive components.
donts: Don't use gradient-led visual styling, decorative color washes, or AI-SaaS-style gradient cards.
Don't use excessively rounded components; buttons, panels, settings controls, and learning cards must feel native to a compact productivity tool.
Don't interrupt reading with large modal workflows when an inline or floating panel can do the job.
Don't over-gamify vocabulary learning or make simple translation/save actions feel like a separate study session.
Don't introduce decorative motion that does not communicate state.
